title: dryopteris subincisa
intro: Dryopteris subincisa, also known as Japanese wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been shown to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dryopteris subincisa include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema. Dryopteris subincisa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
